title: Update edhoc_kdf to match Python _edhoc_kdf signature and CBOR encoding
description: Make edhoc_kdf(prk, th, label: &str, context, length) consistent with python/src/lichen/crypto/edhoc.py:116 using cbor2-style encoding for length+TH+bstr+label+tstr+context. Fix manual CBOR builder bugs (undefined th, wrong label type).
